hero.label: Luxury Beauty Studio
hero.description: Moments that nurture. Rituals that transform.

about.label: About us
about.description: Our team of experienced specialists combines the latest technologies with a holistic approach to beauty. Every treatment is designed individually — because every client is unique.

services.label: Our services
services.hint: Hover over a card or tap it to see treatment details.

01.title: Manicure
01.description: Classic manicure, hybrid gel and cuticle care. We use only certified premium products that are safe for your nails.

02.title: Pedicure
02.description: Comprehensive foot care: SPA pedicure, medical pedicure, nail styling. Regeneration and refreshment of tired feet in a relaxing atmosphere.

03.title: Facial treatment
03.description: Personalised facial rituals tailored to your skin type. Cleansing, hydration, brightening — results visible from the very first visit.

04.title: Relaxation massage
04.description: Full-body massages using Swedish and aromatherapy techniques. We reduce muscle tension and restore harmony between body and mind.

05.title: Eyebrow styling
05.description: Precise eyebrow shaping and correction using thread and wax techniques. Shape design tailored to facial features by a certified brow artist.

06.title: Prestige Ritual
06.description: Our flagship 3-hour ritual combining facial treatment, back and hand massage, and aromatherapy. The complete luxury beauty experience.

footer.description: Luxury beauty studio in Warsaw. Care rituals for the soul and body.

booking.label: Online booking
booking.title: Book your
booking.description: Choose a service, specialist and appointment time. You will receive an SMS confirmation.
booking.successSubtitle: We look forward to seeing you.

meta.homeDescription: RAW RITUAL is an exclusive beauty studio in Warsaw. Facial treatments, manicure, massages and cosmetic rituals. Book online.
meta.bookingDescription: Book your appointment at RAW RITUAL online. Choose a service, time slot and specialist.
